title: Document
description: A PDF Monkey document representing a generated or in-progress PDF file created from a template and data payload.

app_id.description: Workspace (app) identifier this document belongs to

checksum.description: MD5 checksum of the generated PDF file

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created

document_template_id.description: UUID of the template used for generation

download_url.description: Temporary signed S3 URL to download the generated PDF. Valid for 1 hour after generation. Null until generation completes successfully.

failure_cause.description: Human-readable reason for generation failure. Null if not in failure state.

generation_logs.description: Array of log entries from the PDF generation process

meta.description: Custom metadata attached to the document. Maximum size 200 KB.

output_type.description: Output format of the generated file

payload.description: JSON data payload used to render the Handlebars/Liquid template

public_share_link.description: Public shareable link if share_links is enabled on the account

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the document

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update
